character_dossiers.name: John
character_dossiers.biography: Participates in mutiny, expresses frustration over failed plans, references injuries and illness among mutineers.

character_dossiers.name: John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Leader of mutineers, references lost ship and found treasure, manipulates group dynamics.

character_dossiers.name: George Merry
character_dossiers.biography: Mutineer with ague shakes, described as physically frail.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Gave chart to Silver, referenced by mutineers as a figure of authority.

character_dossiers.name: the old man Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: Mutineer who comments on Silver's leadership and the mutiny's outcome.

character_dossiers.name: the sea-cook
character_dossiers.biography: Mutineer who confronts George Merry, references lost ship and treasure.

character_dossiers.name: Dick
character_dossiers.biography: Mutineer with cursed Bible, expresses unease about his situation.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Receives paper from Silver, described as a recipient of the chart.
